summary: Remediated reviewer cycle 003 gaps by replacing reconstructed toolbar height with a direct token-backed source, strengthening AC-1 and AC-4 assertions to exact semantics, and rewriting AC-5 instrumentation to validate deterministic injected WindowInsets delta; all required verification targets pass (including connected AndroidTest on emulator).

evidence: android/app/src/main/java/com/laneshadow/ui/molecules/LSToolbar.kt now resolves toolbar height from direct token bridge `space.xxxxl` instead of `space.xxxxl - space.sm`.

android/app/src/test/java/com/laneshadow/ui/molecules/LSToolbarTest.kt::default_render_uses_chrome_tokens now asserts exact background token, exact height, ghost-button/icon semantics, and centered title bounds.
Existing two-action/title-only behavior remains green under `LSToolbarTest` class run.
No regression introduced in slot composition paths.
Existing large-title typography assertion remains green under `LSNavHeaderTest` class run.
No production changes to LSNavHeader rendering logic were required.

android/app/src/test/java/com/laneshadow/ui/molecules/LSNavHeaderTest.kt::large_title_with_subtitle_renders_both_nodes now asserts exact `LSNavHeaderVerticalGapKey` and exact subtitle color semantics token value.
android/app/src/androidTest/java/com/laneshadow/ui/molecules/LSToolbarUiTest.kt now compares known injected insets vs zero-insets control and asserts exact height delta.
No literal color constructors in molecule files: grep count = 0.
Story registry gate remains satisfied: toolbar/navheader story IDs count = 7 (>= 7).

reviewer_considerations: Confirm the new toolbar-height token bridge (`space.xxxxl`) is the expected Android-side source until component sizing is exposed by theme API.
Review the new `windowInsets` parameter as a testability seam; production default remains `WindowInsets.systemBars`.
Re-check AC-1 contract strictness: assertions now validate exact values and layout centering rather than semantics-key presence.
